creator: mwisnicki+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
On Mon, 3 Dec 2007 06:50:08 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/doxygen,
>
> Please note that PR ports/118392 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/118392
>

Approved, thanks!

Some time ago I have submitted identical patch to previous version
which can now be marked as closed and superseded by this PR.

ports/117550: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=117550
